meta.description: Hourly cron. For every IAML program instance whose '4 PM local on end_date' has passed, mints evaluation rows for each confirmed registrant and emails them the evaluation link via SendGrid. Idempotent — safe to re-run.

nodes.name: Hourly
nodes.notes: Fires at minute 0 of every hour. The DB RPC filters by program-instance local timezone.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: POST to /webhook/eval-email-run to fire on-demand (useful for manual first-send after end_date).

nodes.name: Get Send Queue
nodes.notes: Mints evals for any newly-eligible instance and returns unsent queue (max 100 per run).

nodes.name: Compose Email
nodes.notes: Per-item. Produces subject/text/html for the SendGrid call. Phoebe Harper voice; mentions program city + Block 1 instructor first name.

nodes.name: Send via SendGrid
nodes.notes: Success → Mark Sent. Failure → Mark Failed (records error, attempt counter increments; row retries until attempts >= 3).

nodes.name: Mark Failed
nodes.notes: Increments email_send_attempts and stores the error. Row will fall out of the queue once attempts >= 3.
